item.title: Why was Andrew arrested and what happens next?
item.description: What we know about Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor's arrest on suspicion of misconduct in public office.

item.title: Austrian climber found guilty after girlfriend froze to death on mountain
item.description: The woman died of hypothermia during a climbing trip on the Grossglockner mountain in January 2025.

item.title: Grey's Anatomy star Eric Dane dies at 53 after ALS diagnosis
item.description: The actor, who also starred in HBO's Euphoria, battled the most common form of motor neurone disease.

item.title: Asos co-founder dies after Thailand apartment block fall
item.description: Quentin Griffiths co-founded Asos in 2000 and remained a significant shareholder after leaving the firm five years later.

item.title: 'Best ski season in years' on Scotland's snowy hills
item.description: Some of Scotland's mountain resorts say it has been the best winter snowsports season in six years.
